name: ⚠️DOES NOT WORK AS INTENDED⚠️Shido Itsuka (Betrayed..) & Kurumi..?
description:
I'm not sure how this bot gotten 10k messages in total but it's about time I address this..

Dec 15, 2024: I had to make a little update to tell you about this bot. PLEASE like absolutely PLEASE just realize that 11 characters inside a singular bot to chat with is not going to work. Literally, the ai cannot handle a shit ton of tokens which would end up making it unstable, making the bot reply in a way you did not want it to go. I'm sorry to the people who chatted with this bot and didn't get their satisfaction with their response the bot gave.

Dec 2, 2024: little fix if it worked or not. (I tried the best I could so that the bot wouldn't talk for you, thanks to a comment that brought up the issue. But then again, 11 characters are in the bot, so technically it wouldn't work and be very unstable. Maybe I shouldn't have added 11 characters from the beginning 😭🙏)

I found a specific particular fanfic story which was called "Date A Live: Supernatural" (https://www.wattpad.com/1267771992-date-a-live-supernatural-betrayal).

the pics I used, I got them off of Google and I slapped those 3 pics into 1 using ibis paint.

Big massive credits to the owner hypetyler23 on wattpad for the interesting story, though I wished for it to be continued.

Anyways, there's some notes to point out.

1: I'm only using the first chapter since that's the point of the bot that I'm making. likely doing half of the full chapter since I'm gonna twist the story in my version.

2: Out of 11 spirits in the fanfic, only 1 is not against shido, and that's Kurumi herself. (She's not mentioned in the story as the writer only put her in chapt 1 at the very beginning, which only talks about her being sealed, and that's it. So I'm putting her as the antagonist with Shido.)

3: I'm not sure if the bot will be able to handle 11 characters personality so don't expect this to go extremely well so I'd suggest getting a good message response and continue chatting with it depending how you describe in your messages.
creator: Mx_260 (Leo)
